composition_pattern: fill-cover -> replace-body-lines -> insert-support-page -> delete-internal-page -> reorder-kept-pages -> rebuild-outline
user_task_description: Fill the cover placeholders from the answered questionnaire.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Fill the cover placeholders from the answered questionnaire, insert the required evidence pages in the specified section order, and keep the legal disclaimer and existing approved appendix pages unchanged.
atomic_scope: Only the cover lines, body lines, inserted support page, deleted internal page, final page order, and outline are required.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf artifact that completes the requested cross-document document operation.

notes.Task Notes:
- Preserve the image-bearing evidence page
- Do not flatten the packet into regenerated plain pages

lines: Rule 1: Keep the evidence map in the final packet.
Rule 2: Insert the customer summary after the response rules page.
Rule 3: Remove the internal-only appendix before delivery.
Insert this summary after the response-rules page.
